languages.text: Bionics are pieces of machinery and technology used across Imperium as a replacement (and, rarely, purpose-build enhancement) to the fallable flesh of its denizens.

traits.locale_text: Bionics are pieces of machinery and technology used across Imperium as a replacement (and, rarely, purpose-build enhancement) to the fallable flesh of its denizens.

languages.text:
Augments are sacred mechanisms of the Omnissiah, wrought to replace the weakness of flesh and elevate the body beyond its natural limits.
Across the Imperium, they serve both as necessary replacements for broken limbs and as instruments of sanctioned enhancement, binding steel and spirit into a single, enduring form.
languages.original_text: Bionics are pieces of machinery and technology used across Imperium as a replacement (and, rarely, purpose-build enhancement) to the fallable flesh of its denizens.

traits.locale_text:
Augments are sacred mechanisms of the Omnissiah, wrought to replace the weakness of flesh and elevate the body beyond its natural limits.
Across the Imperium, they serve both as necessary replacements for ruined limbs and as instruments of sanctioned enhancement, binding steel and spirit into a single, enduring form.

Across the Imperium, they serve both as necessary replacements for broken limbs and as instruments of sanctioned enhancement, binding steel and spirit into a single, enduring form.

Augments are sacred mechanisms of the Omnissiah, wrought to replace the weakness of flesh and elevate the body beyond its natural limits.
Across the Imperium, they serve both as necessary replacements for broken limbs and as instruments of sanctioned enhancement, binding steel and spirit into a single, enduring form.

languages.text:
Аугменты — священные механизмы Омниссии, замещающие слабую плоть и возвышающие тело над пределами его естественных ограничений.
Распространенные по всему Империуму, они могут служить и для необходимой замены поврежденных конечностей, и для санкционированного усовершенствования, связывая сталь и дух в неделимое, прочное целое.

Распространенные по всему Империуму, они могут служить и для необходимой замены поврежденных конечностей, и для санкционированного усовершенствования, связывая сталь и дух в неделимое, прочное целое.

languages.text:
Augmentationen sind heilige Mechanismen des Omnissiah, die die Schwäche des Fleisches ersetzen und den Körper über seine natürlichen Grenzen hinaus verbessern.
Innerhalb des Imperiums dienen sie als notwendiger Ersatz für gebrochene Gliedmaßen und als Instrumente sanktionierter Erweiterungen, die Stahl und Verstand zu einer einzelnen, robusten Form verbinden.
languages.original_text:
Augments are sacred mechanisms of the Omnissiah, wrought to replace the weakness of flesh and elevate the body beyond its natural limits.
Across the Imperium, they serve both as necessary replacements for broken limbs and as instruments of sanctioned enhancement, binding steel and spirit into a single, enduring form.

Innerhalb des Imperiums dienen sie als notwendiger Ersatz für gebrochene Gliedmaßen und als Instrumente sanktionierter Erweiterungen, die Stahl und Verstand zu einer einzelnen, robusten Form verbinden.

languages.text:
Los aumentos son mecanismos sagrados del Omnissiah, forjados para reemplazar las debilidades de la carne y elevar al cuerpo más allá de sus límites naturales.
Sirven por todo el Imperium como reemplazos necesarios para extremidades rotas e instrumentos de mejora autorizada que vinculan acero y espíritu en un receptáculo resistente.

languages.text:
植入物是欧姆尼赛亚的神圣机械，用以弥补血肉的苦弱，让躯体超越自然极限。
帝国境内，它们既是断肢的必要替代品，亦是经许可的强化工具，将钢铁与灵魂熔铸为不朽之躯。
languages.original_text:

languages.text:
Ogmentler; etin zayıflıklarını gidermek ve bedeni doğal sınırlarının ötesine taşımak için dövülmüş, Hermesih'in mukaddes mekanizmalarıdır.
İmparatorluk genelinde hem kopan uzuvların yerini dolduran zaruri birer ihtiyaç hem de çelikle ruhu tek bir potada eriterek sağlamlaştıran onaylı geliştirme araçları vazifesi görürler.
languages.original_text:
Augments are sacred mechanisms of the Omnissiah, wrought to replace the weakness of flesh and elevate the body beyond its natural limits.
Across the Imperium, they serve both as necessary replacements for broken limbs and as instruments of sanctioned enhancement, binding steel and spirit into a single, enduring form.

İmparatorluk genelinde hem kopan uzuvların yerini dolduran zaruri birer ihtiyaç hem de çelikle ruhu tek bir potada eriterek sağlamlaştıran onaylı geliştirme araçları vazifesi görürler.

languages.text:
Les augmentations sont des mécanismes sacrés de l'Omnimessie. Elles sont vouées à remplacer la faiblesse de la chair et à transcender le corps humain afin de lui permettre de s'affranchir de ses limites naturelles.
Dans tout l'Imperium, elles servent à la fois de substitut nécessaire afin de remplacer des membres brisés, comme d'instruments de renforcement approuvés, qui lient l'acier et l'esprit en une forme unique et plus résistante.
languages.original_text:
Augments are sacred mechanisms of the Omnissiah, wrought to replace the weakness of flesh and elevate the body beyond its natural limits.
Across the Imperium, they serve both as necessary replacements for broken limbs and as instruments of sanctioned enhancement, binding steel and spirit into a single, enduring form.

languages.text:
増幅器はオムニシアの聖なる機械であり、肉体の弱さを補い、自然の限界を超えた身体へと導くために作られた。
帝国各地で、増幅器は壊れた肢の必要不可欠な代替手段であり、承認された強化の道具でもある。鋼と精神を一つに、永続的な形へと結ぶ。
